The Great Pasta House

4.5
1,234 reviews
John D.
2 months ago Amazing pasta! The carbonara was perfectly creamy and the service was outstanding. Will definitely come back.
Sarah M.
1 month ago Great food but a bit pricey. The ambiance is lovely though, perfect for date night.
Mike R.
3 weeks ago Food was okay but the wait was too long. Had to wait 25 minutes for a table even with a reservation.
Emily K.
a week ago Best Italian in the city! The tiramisu is to die for. Friendly staff and cozy atmosphere.
Alex T.
5 days ago Overrated. The pasta was bland and overcooked. Not worth the price at all.
